content.thinking:
Let me analyze this issue. The error is a NullPointerException in the `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt` at line 98. The issue is that when there's an empty THEN block in an if-else statement (like `else if ("b" == "c") else {`), the code tries to call `getFirstChildNode()` which returns null, and then tries to call `getElementType()` on that null value.

Let me first look at the relevant files to understand the code structure.

 30→/**
 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing
 32→ * makes statements easier to read.
 33→ */
 34→public class IfElseBracingRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),
 43→    Rule.Experimental,
 44→    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 45→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 46→
 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
117→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
118→    ): Boolean {
119→        emit(
120→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
121→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {
125→            autocorrect(node)
126→        }
127→        return true
128→    }
129→
130→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
131→        val prevLeaves =
132→            node
133→                .leaves(forward = false)
134→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
135→                .toList()
136→                .reversed()
137→        val nextLeaves =
138→            node
139→                .leaves(forward = true)
140→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
141→                .toList()
142→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
143→
144→        prevLeaves
145→            .firstOrNull()
146→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
147→            ?.let {
148→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
149→            }
150→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
151→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
152→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
153→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
154→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
155→            prevLeaves

157→                .forEach(::addChild)

159→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
160→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
161→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))

 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =

 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),

 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(

 53→    }

 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)

 63→    }

 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }

 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
117→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
118→    ): Boolean {
119→        emit(
120→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
121→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {
125→            autocorrect(node)
126→        }
127→        return true
128→    }
129→
130→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
131→        val prevLeaves =
132→            node
133→                .leaves(forward = false)
134→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
135→                .toList()
136→                .reversed()
137→        val nextLeaves =
138→            node
139→                .leaves(forward = true)
140→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
141→                .toList()
142→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
143→
144→        prevLeaves
145→            .firstOrNull()
146→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
147→            ?.let {
148→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
149→            }
150→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
151→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
152→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
153→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
154→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
155→            prevLeaves
156→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
157→                .forEach(::addChild)
158→            addChild(previousChild)

1. Line 110: `this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()` - if `firstChildNode` is null, this could cause issues

- In `visitIfStatement`, the `thenBracing` and `elseBracing` are calculated via `hasBracing()`
- If the node has no children (empty), `hasBracing()` returns false (via line 110 recursion that eventually becomes null)
- Then at line 85: `if (!thenBracing)` -> `visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, ...)` is called
- Then at line 120: `node.firstChildNode.startOffset` throws NPE because `firstChildNode` is null

So the fix for `IfElseBracingRule.kt` should be:
1. Make `hasBracing()` handle the null case for `firstChildNode` (line 110)
2. Add a null check in `visitBranchWithoutBraces` (line 119-120)

else -> {
    this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
}
```

Since `hasBracing()` is an extension function on `ASTNode?`, if `firstChildNode` is null, it will just return false. This won't cause a crash.

```

If `node.firstChildNode` is null (empty THEN/ELSE block), this will throw NPE.

The solution requires a defensive null check before attempting to access `firstChildNode` properties, preventing potential runtime exceptions during static code analysis.

content.thinking:
All tests pass. Let me summarize the fix:

1. In `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt`:
   - Added a null check at line 67-70 to return early if `node.firstChildNode` is null (empty THEN/ELSE block)

2. In `IfElseBracingRule.kt`:
   - Added a null check at line 119-120 to return false if `node.firstChildNode` is null (empty THEN/ELSE block)

The issue was that when there's code like `else if ("b" == "c") else {}`, the THEN block after the condition `("b" == "c")` is empty (has no children). The rules were trying to access `firstChildNode.elementType` or `firstChildNode.startOffset` without checking if `firstChildNode` was null, causing a NullPointerException.

The fix is minimal and targeted - we just skip processing for empty THEN/ELSE blocks, which is the correct behavior since there's nothing to format or wrap in braces.

Both the existing tests and the new tests pass, confirming the fix works correctly without breaking existing functionality.

content.text:
All tests pass. Let me summarize the fix:

## Summary of Changes

### Issue
A `NullPointerException` occurs in the `MultiLineIfElseRule` when processing code with an empty THEN block in an if-else statement, such as:
```kotlin
if ("a" == "b") {
} else if ("b" == "c") else {
}
```

In this case, `else if ("b" == "c") else` has an empty THEN block after the condition, where `node.firstChildNode` is `null`.

### Root Cause
In `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt` at line 98, the code was accessing `node.firstChildNode.elementType` without checking if `firstChildNode` could be null. When the THEN block is empty, `firstChildNode` is indeed `null`, causing the NPE.

### Fix
I made two changes to handle this edge case:

1. **MultiLineIfElseRule.kt** (lines 67-70): Added an early return when the THEN or ELSE node has no children:
```kotlin
// Ignore when THEN or ELSE block is empty (e.g. `if ("a" == "b") else { }`)
if (node.firstChildNode == null) {
    return
}
```

2. **IfElseBracingRule.kt** (lines 119-120): Added a null check in `visitBranchWithoutBraces`:
```kotlin
// Ignore when THEN or ELSE block is empty (e.g. `if ("a" == "b") else { }`)
val firstChildNode = node.firstChildNode ?: return false
```

Both fixes gracefully skip processing for empty THEN/ELSE blocks rather than crashing.

 30→/**
 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing
 32→ * makes statements easier to read.
 33→ */
 34→public class IfElseBracingRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),
 43→    Rule.Experimental,
 44→    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 45→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 46→
 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
117→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
118→    ): Boolean {
119→        emit(
120→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
121→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {
125→            autocorrect(node)
126→        }
127→        return true
128→    }
129→
130→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
131→        val prevLeaves =
132→            node
133→                .leaves(forward = false)
134→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
135→                .toList()
136→                .reversed()
137→        val nextLeaves =
138→            node
139→                .leaves(forward = true)
140→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
141→                .toList()
142→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
143→
144→        prevLeaves
145→            .firstOrNull()
146→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
147→            ?.let {
148→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
149→            }
150→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
151→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
152→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
153→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
154→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
155→            prevLeaves
156→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
157→                .forEach(::addChild)
158→            addChild(previousChild)
159→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
160→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
161→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
162→        }
163→
164→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
165→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
166→            node
167→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
168→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
169→        }
170→    }
171→}

 30→/**
 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing
 32→ * makes statements easier to read.
 33→ */
 34→public class IfElseBracingRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),
 43→    Rule.Experimental,
 44→    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 45→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 46→
 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
117→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
118→    ): Boolean {
119→        emit(
120→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
121→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {
125→            autocorrect(node)
126→        }

 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing

 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(

 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
